commands.review_summary:
The PR narrows Windows argv executable detection, parses Windows netstat listener ports exactly, and retains defined falsy realtime ignored contexts with focused regression tests.

PR surface: Source -3, Tests +94. Total +91 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main contains the broad node.exe match, substring port filter, and falsy context guard that explain the reported failures. I did not run live Windows reproduction because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: The protected maintainer label and mock-only Windows proof make this a human merge decision rather than an automated repair job.
